title: Sweet Flaky Brazilian Bread Toast
description: A sweet and cozy Brazilian dish featuring white bread, steam, and a hint of cinnamon, perfect for a gluten-free friendly breakfast or snack. This recipe is easy to make and requires minimal ingredients.
instructions: In a shallow dish, whisk together the eggs, milk, vanilla extract, and a pinch of salt.
Heat the unsalted butter in a non-stick skillet over medium heat.
Dip each bread slice into the egg mixture, coating both sides evenly.
Place the coated bread slices in the skillet and cook for 2-3 minutes on each side, or until golden brown.
Transfer the bread slices to a baking dish and sprinkle with granulated sugar and cinnamon powder.
Bake in the preheated oven for 5-7 minutes, or until the sugar is caramelized and the bread is toasted.
Remove from the oven and let cool for a minute or two.
